prompt: I need to render my Infisical secrets as a .env file on disk for my Node.js app running in Docker. I want the file to auto-update when secrets change. Show me the full Infisical Agent config file I'd need.
assertions: Shows complete YAML config with correct top-level sections (infisical, auth, sinks, templates)
Uses listSecrets or listSecretsByProjectSlug template function with correct 4-arg signature
Uses correct Go template syntax ({{- with ... }} / {{- range . }} / {{ .Key }}={{ .Value }})
Includes destination-path pointing to a .env file
Mentions execute.command option for triggering app restart on change
